title: Product UI design system and visual identity
summary: Define the M8 player-facing UI design system, visual identity and HUD hierarchy so the default interface no longer reads as a diagnostics harness.
acceptance: Defines M8 theme tokens for color, typography, spacing, panels, buttons, alerts, resource cards, resident cards and debug overlays
Defines the default player HUD information hierarchy for current phase, next goal, resources, resident state, tasks/events and night risk
Defines how Wuming Town visual identity expresses lanterns, Chronicle, ordinances, residents, explanation and folk-horror settlement fantasy without requiring final art assets
Defines debug/diagnostics surfaces as explicit dev/debug overlays, not default player UI
Does not implement UI runtime or create final store/release claims

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until WM-0111 is done.
Defined the M8 product UI design system, visual identity, HUD hierarchy, explicit debug overlay boundary and data-driven scenario fixtures; required checks passed.

verified: No blocking findings; acceptance evidence confirmed for M8 theme tokens, player HUD hierarchy, Wuming identity cues, debug overlay boundary and no runtime/release overclaims. Required checks pass; pnpm quality passes with pnpm 11.8.0 PATH shim adjustment.
Independent reviewer verified WM-0112; integration gate passed: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and pnpm quality.

review.summary: No blocking findings; acceptance evidence confirmed for M8 theme tokens, player HUD hierarchy, Wuming identity cues, debug overlay boundary and no runtime/release overclaims. Required checks pass; pnpm quality passes with pnpm 11.8.0 PATH shim adjustment.

integration.summary: Independent reviewer verified WM-0112; integration gate passed: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and pnpm quality.
